commit.message:
[renovate] Recover Gitea runtime after stale network drift

Purpose: Repair the live ws-0297 replay when Gitea survives Docker recovery attached to a missing compose network.
Scope: Add the OpenBao helper fact fix, add Gitea stale-network force-recreate logic, extend focused tests, and capture the live failure/recovery receipts.
Status: Live converge-gitea now completes end to end again and the Gitea proxy plus guest listener respond after recovery.
Next: Push this branch into private Gitea, dispatch the Renovate workflow, then update ADR/workstream state and integrate on the latest main.
See also: ADR 0297
